---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `dck ...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error output if applicable.

## Environment

- DockerKit version: (`dck version`)
- Docker version: (`docker --version`)
- OS: (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14)
- Shell: (e.g., bash 5.2, zsh 5.9)

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information (logs, screenshots, config).
